question: If you are told your amateur station is causing television interference, what should you do?

choices.A: First make sure your station is operating properly, and it does cause interference to your own television
choices.B: Immediately turn off your transmitter and contact the nearest NTC office
choices.C: Connect a high-pass filter to the transmitter output and low-pass filter to the antenna input of the television
choices.D: Continue operating normally, because you have no reason to worry about the interference

What could happen to your transciever if you replace its blown 5 amp AC line fuse with 30 amp fuse?

choices.A: The 30-amp fuse better protect to your transciever from using too much current
choices.C: The transciever could use more current than 5 amps and a fire could occur
choices.D: The transciever would not be able to produce as much RF output

question: How could you best keep unauthorized persons from using your amateur atTION t home?

choices.A: Use carrier-operated relay in the main power line
choices.B: Use a ke-operated on/off switch in the main power line
choices.C: Put a "Danger-High Voltage" sign in the station
choices.D: Put fuses in the main power line

question: What is most important accessory to have for a hand-held radio in an emergency?

choices.D: A microphone headset for hands-free operation

question: What may happen if an SSB transmitter is operated with the microphone gain set too high?

choices.A: It may cause digital interference to computer equipment
choices.B: It may cause splatter interference to other stations operating near its frequency
choices.C: It may cause atmospheric interference in the air around the antenna
choices.D: It may cause interference to other stations operating on a higher frequency

What is capture effect?

choices.A: The capturing of electrons in a vacuum tube by the plate electrode.
choices.B: A phenomenon in FM reception in which only the stronger of two signals at, or near, the same frequency will be demodulated.
choices.C: Wideband antennas have this characteristic effect.
